use_cases: Form inputs for terms of service, newsletters, or newsletter subscriptions
Task lists and todo items in productivity applications
Settings toggles for feature preferences in dashboards
Agreement checkboxes in checkout flows and sign-up forms
Filter selections in data tables or product catalogs
ai_summary: A minimalist animated checkbox component featuring a smooth spring-based checkmark path animation and state management via Framer Motion. The checkbox transitions between unchecked and checked states with a clean SVG checkmark that draws in with an easeOut timing curve. Includes props for title, defaultChecked state, custom styling via className, and onCheckedChange callback for form integration.
